summary: Danish quantum software company Kvantify announced the successful second close of its funding round, totaling €7 million, with participation from the European Innovation Council Fund and Delphinus Venture Capital. Dr. Jörg Weiser, Kvantify’s Executive Chairperson, emphasized that the investment will accelerate innovation in quantum-enabled drug discovery. The funding supports Kvantify’s Qrunch technology, launched in November 2025, which enables quantum chemistry simulations on existing quantum computers to advance molecular discovery workflows. The European Innovation Council Fund’s Chair, Svetoslava Georgieva, highlighted Kvantify’s role in positioning Europe at the forefront of quantum-lifesci innovation, while Delphinus Venture Capital’s Mathias Lorenz cited confidence in Kvantify’s team and technology to deliver practical impact in drug discovery.
